steps.prompt: When it is morning, the sun comes up. What do you think the sky looks like? Press Morning and see!
Because it is morning, the sun rises. The sky turns light. Morning brings the sun! The sun has been climbing all morning. Where do you think it will be at lunchtime? Press Lunch!
Because it is midday, the sun is right at the top. The higher the clock goes, the higher the sun climbs! Now press Bedtime. What do you think will happen to the sun?
steps.feedback: Because it is night time, the sun went away — and the moon came out! When the sun goes down, the moon comes up.
